message:
beads sync: close bd-x8z63 (res_* aliases + send hooks + ns_name_ntol/rollback shipped)

Mirrors the close transition for the libresolv PORT issue that landed
in commit cc39adc1 (`feat(resolv): port res_gethostby* aliases +
res_send hooks + ns_name_ntol/rollback (bd-x8z63)`).

The JSONL row for `bd-x8z63` flips:
  status: "open"     -> "closed"
  closed_at:         set to 2026-04-26T15:58:17.299483851Z
  updated_at:        bumped to match
  close_reason:      "shipped: 7 libresolv entries (res_gethostby* x3
                      + res_send_set{q,r}hook + ns_name_ntol +
                      ns_name_rollback) + 11 abi tests, all green"

No other beads in the sync delta. This is the standard
`br sync --flush-only` JSONL export that follows the implementation
commit per AGENTS.md "Landing the Plane".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
